description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Extra CI that runs on push to master, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: linux and clang. The linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of different build configurations (TBB, OpenMP, noexcept, xsimd, and xsimd-TBB), while the clang job runs on windows-latest. For each job, check out the code, set up a conda environment, configure and build the project using CMake, and run tests with ctest.
